newsArray.title: 'A long wait of nearly seven decades': PM Modi hails J&K's historic Ranji Trophy win
newsArray.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi hailed Jammu and Kashmir’s first Ranji Trophy win as a proud moment after nearly 70 years. In ‘Mann Ki Baat’, he praised the team’s hard work, captain Paras Dogra’s leadership, and Aaqib Nabi’s 60 wickets. Modi said the victory has inspired the region and boosted sports enthusiasm, adding that Jammu and Kashmir is emerging as a sporting hub and expressing hope for continued success.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.title: CSK Battles Injuries but Eyes Promising Start with New Faces
newsArray.description: CSK Battles Injuries but Eyes Promising Start with New Faces Chennai Super Kings (CSK) are gearing up for their IPL opener against Rajasthan Royals, but not without facing significant hurdles. Head coach Stephen Fleming confirmed that wicketkeeper-batsman Mahendra Singh Dhoni is sidelined due to a calf injury, while Dewald Brevis is out with a side strain. The twin injuries challenge the team's lineup, though Fleming assured fans of Dhoni's continued strategic influence despite his absence from the field. Sanju Samson is anticipated to fill in for Dhoni, bringing enthusiasm and energy to the squad. This season, CSK is shifting focus towards a mix of experience and youthful exuberance. Fleming emphasized the importance of a strong start, recalling last season's poor beginnings. With new energy from players like Samson and a fit Ruturaj Gaikwad, the team aims to adapt to the dynamic nature of modern cricket, focusing on aggressive play and youthful vitality to match the evolved trends of the game.
creator: devdiscourse news desk

newsArray.title: Yashasvi Jaiswal IPL Stats Against CSK: आईपीएल इतिहास में चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स के खिलाफ कुछ ऐसा रहा हैं यशस्वी जायसवाल का प्रदर्शन, देखें विस्फोटक सलामी बल्लेबाज के आकंड़ें
newsArray.description: इंडियन प्रीमियर लीग (IPL) 2026 का तीसरा मुकाबला गुवाहाटी के बारसापारा क्रिकेट स्टेडियम में राजस्थान रॉयल्स (RR) और चेन्नई सुपरकिंग्स (CSK) के बीच खेला जाएगा. पिछला सीजन दोनों टीमों के लिए निराशाजनक रहा था, जहां वे क्रमश: नौवें और अंतिम स्थान पर रहीं और 14 में से सिर्फ 4 मुकाबले जीते. इस बार दोनों की नजर बेहतर शुरुआत पर होगी.

newsArray.title: Kolkata Knight Riders Set to Face Mumbai Indians in IPL 2026 Opener Amid Injury Concerns
newsArray.description: As the Kolkata Knight Riders gear up for their IPL 2026 opener against the Mumbai Indians, they face challenges with injuries, particularly concerning Matheesha Pathirana. Acquired for ₹18 crore, Pathirana's fitness remains uncertain after an injury during the T20 World Cup. KKR's assistant coach Shane Watson emphasizes the team's commitment to Pathirana's long-term health, indicating that they will not rush his return. This cautious approach highlights KKR's strategy as they aim to integrate their key player into the squad effectively. Stay tuned for more updates on this developing situation.
creator: narendra chaudhary
